case_title: BUCHALTER NEMER, A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION VS. MICHAEL SMITH et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF NON-RECEIPT OF OPPOS OT MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION FILED BY PETITIONER BUCHALTER NEMER, A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER BUCHALTER NEMER, A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION'S NTC OF MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 14, 2013 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS MOTION TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 28, 2013 AT 4:00 PM, OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Amend Order Compelling Arbitration
Off Calendar Sep-03-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was uncontested. PETITIONER BUCHALTER NEMER, A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION'S Motion To Amend Order Compelling Arbitration is Granted. No opposition filed. The Court signed the proposed order submitted with the moving papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-14-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PETITIONER BUCHALTER NEMER, A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION's Motion To Compel Arbitration is Granted. No opposition filed. The Court signed the proposed order emailed to the court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Feb-28-2013 Continued To Mar-14-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER BUCHALTER NEMER, A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION'S Ntc Of Motion To Compel Arbitration
is continued to March 14, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of its motion to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than February 28, 2013 at 4:00 pm, or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)
